title: Saagaavaram Lyrics Uttama Villain Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Uthama Villain Saagaavaram Tamil Song Lyrics
Singer(s): kamal haasan, yazin nizar, Ranjith Iyyappan,
Lyrics : Kamal haasan.
Music: M Ghibran

Saagaavaram pol sogam unndoh
kelaai mannaa!!
Theeraa kadhayai kettpaar unndoh
kelaai mannaa!!

Kaniyar kaniththa
kanakku padi naam
kaanum ulagidhu
vatta pandhaam. (vatta pandhaam)

Vatta pandhai vattamadikkum
mattra pandhum
podhum aandae.
podhum aandae.

Maalaa oliyaam niyaayirum kooda
matttorr ugaththil pogum karindhae.

mulaithu murithdhum
thulirkkum vazhai-than
maranam kulle
vittadhu vidhaiye
(kelaai mannaa)

Vidhaithidum
mei pol oru uyirai
uyirthu vilangum
en kavidhai vilangum
kavidhai viangum

Vilungi thulangidum
vamsam vaazha
vaazhum naalil kadamai seyya
seyyul pol oru
kadhal vendum
kadhal vendum
seyyul pol oru- kadhal vendum

vendiyadhellam vaaitha oruvan
saavayum vendi seththa kadhaigal
aayiram unndu,
kelaai mannaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Saagaavaram?

Saagaavaram reflects themes of nostalgia and longing, capturing the emotional essence of the characters in Uthama Villain.

How does Saagaavaram fit into the plot of Uthama Villain?

The song plays a crucial role in expressing the protagonist's inner turmoil and emotional struggles throughout the film.

Who are the singers of Saagaavaram?

The song features a collaboration of talented artists including Kamal Haasan, Iyyappan, Ranjith, and Yazin.

Who wrote the lyrics for Saagaavaram?

The lyrics for Saagaavaram were penned by none other than Kamal Haasan himself.

When was Saagaavaram released?

Saagaavaram was released on March 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Saagaavaram, the characters of Uthama Villain navigate through deep emotional landscapes, reflecting on their past and the weight of their choices. The song's melancholic tone and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect backdrop for moments of introspection. With its rich vocal performances, the track beautifully conveys the struggles of love and loss. Overall, it stands out as a heartfelt expression of the film's themes.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saagaavaram from Uthama Villain is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and longing. Featuring the unique collaboration of legendary Kamal Haasan alongside talented singers Iyyappan, Ranjith, and Yazin, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Its poignant lyrics and emotive delivery make it a standout track in the film's soundtrack.
stanzaMeanings: Like a sad story, there is sorrow in this place! Listen to the tale, there is sorrow in this place!
We see the world through the calculations of cleverness.
The roundness of the circle can be disturbed by other things.
Even the flower's fragrance and the essence of life will fade away in other matters.
Even after being disturbed and hurt, life will still grow in the child.
The sprouting and breaking of the banana plant's stem leads to death within the seed.
Like a true life that shines, my poetry will shine.
In the days when the lineage flourishes, love is needed to fulfill duties.
Everything that is needed is fulfilled by one person, and there are a thousand stories of death.
